_attribution.description: Real WebAuthn `packed` attestation captured from a YubiKey 5 series authenticator during a registration ceremony against William Brown's webauthn-rs compatibility test site at https://webauthn.firstyear.id.au.
_attribution.source_license: MPL-2.0 (file-level). Real device-emitted bytes are not subject to the source-file license; cited here for traceability of the captured ceremony.
_attribution.why_this_fixture: Yubico U2F EE leaf chains directly to `Yubico U2F Root CA Serial 457200631` — the production Yubico root motebit already pins as YUBICO_FIDO_ROOT_PEM in fido-roots.ts. The real ceremony exercises every wire-format code path of @motebit/crypto-webauthn (CBOR parse, x5c chain validation against the pinned production root, ECDSA-P256 signature verify over authData||clientDataHash, rpIdHash binding) without needing any test-only root override. Identity-binding (clientDataJSON.challenge === SHA256(motebit canonical body)) is by design unsatisfiable for a third-party-captured ceremony and is asserted false in the test.

leaf_subject: C=SE, O=Yubico AB, OU=Authenticator Attestation, CN=Yubico U2F EE Serial 512722740
